caption: A man with glasses and a large, grey, cone-shaped wig is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with a bow tie and brown suspenders. He wears headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background is a wall decorated with various framed photographs and apparel. To the right of the man, a white mannequin torso is visible. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" appears on the screen, accompanied by the smaller text "PODCAST" and "Listen on iTunes." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and gaze downward while continuing to speak. His facial expression remains relatively consistent, though his mouth moves as he talks. The lighting and overall composition of the scene remain static across the sequence.
